name: Feigned Retreat
flavor: Realms at War Stratagem — a signature Reaction card of Saladin. Slip away from the blow, then turn on the over-extended foe. The classic lure of the steppe and desert.
reactionTrigger: When an opposing player declares a valid target against one of your Warriors.
summary: Before the Attack is rolled, the targeted Warrior immediately makes 1 Move. If it is no longer a valid target afterwards, the Attack is wasted.

effects.text: The targeted Warrior makes 1 Move (it may break line of sight).
